narrative:
Clay Twp township has 1,118 registered voters, with 47.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.6 percentage points.
